fields.title: Ammunition
fields.description: A list of ammunition entries that define which items can be used as projectiles for this shooter. Each entry specifies the item, whether to search the offhand, inventory, and whether to use in creative mode.

fields.title: Scale Power By Draw Duration
fields.description: When true, the projectile's launch power increases based on how long the player holds the use button before releasing. Default is false.

fields.title: Max Draw Duration
fields.description: The maximum time in seconds that a player can draw the shooter before it automatically fires or reaches maximum power. Default is 0.

fields.title: Charge On Draw
fields.description: When true, the shooter begins charging when the player starts drawing, similar to a crossbow. Default is false.

description: Compels an item to shoot projectiles, similarly to a bow or crossbow. Must have the minecraft:use_modifiers component in order to function properly.
note: Ammunition used by minecraft:shooter must have the minecraft:projectile component in order to function properly.
note2: Items equipped with the shooter component will only sustain damage while shooting. Durability will remain unaffected if the item is used for melee attacks.
title: Item Components Shooter
